temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, smoky room, a man in a dark suit and glasses looks down with a serious expression. He is speaking to another man, whose back is to the camera. The man with glasses asks a question. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense confrontation. The man with glasses is questioning the other man, Mao Ge, about who sent him, establishing an immediate power dynamic and mystery.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, questioning. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, ambient soundscape.)
(00:04-00:07) The man in the foreground, Mao Ge, turns his head slightly to the side, away from the man with glasses. He looks down and away, avoiding the question and refusing to answer. (Storyline: Mao Ge's refusal to answer the question heightens the tension and confirms he is hiding something, escalating the confrontation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Subdued, dismissive. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense ambient sound continues.)
